---
title: "AI Sentiment"
subtitle: 'Dissecting Public Sentiment on AI by Demographics'
categories: ["Shiny"]
date: "2026-03-11"
image: "../images/ai_shiny.png"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

<div class="shiny-iframe-container" style="width: 100%; height: 750px; overflow: hidden; border: 2px solid #881ca3; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);">
  <object data="https://3vw3oh-veronica-pletsch.shinyapps.io/FallFinalRedo/" 
          type="text/html" 
          style="width: 142.8%; height: 1071px; border: none; transform: scale(0.7); transform-origin: 0 0;">
    This browser does not support embedding external pages. 
    Please visit the app directly: <a href="https://3vw3oh-veronica-pletsch.shinyapps.io/FallFinalRedo/">App Link</a>
  </object>
</div>
